author: ben_a_adams
content: What criteria would a theme of AA be judged on to be a success vs failure, or partial win?

author: ben_a_adams
content:
i.e. what are the goals; what is trying to be achieved

Otherwise is sloppy and could do anything and say AA was a great success even if what was done isn't very useful

author: ben_a_adams
content: Unless the theme of AA is "do frames" which then cheating a bit and starting with solution without clearly stating what its trying to solve
